SECTION HEADING: Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do I need the app to use Lumina?
A: No. Lumina works fully out of the box вЂ” just plug it in and it auto-calibrates to your room using its ambient light sensor and built-in circadian rhythm engine. The app is optional and gives you access to calendar integration, custom scenes, and manual fine-tuning if you want it.

Q: Which calendars does Lumina support?
A: Lumina integrates with Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, and Apple Calendar. It reads event titles and types to assign optimal lighting profiles. For example, events tagged as "Focus" or "Deep Work" trigger cool, high-concentration light, while meetings trigger warmer, video-call-friendly light. You can customize these mappings in the app.

Q: How does the ambient light sensor work?
A: Lumina has a 360В° ambient light sensor array built into its head. It continuously measures the brightness and color temperature of light in your room and adjusts its output to maintain consistent, optimal lighting at your desk. It recalibrates in real time вЂ” so when clouds roll in or the sun shifts, your workspace lighting stays steady.

Q: Can I override the automatic settings?
A: Absolutely. While Lumina is designed to work autonomously, you always have full control. The companion app lets you adjust brightness and color temperature manually, create custom scenes, and save presets. You can also tap the base of the lamp to cycle between three quick-access modes (Focus, Relax, Video Call).

Q: What's the return policy?
A: We offer a 30-day no-questions-asked return policy. Try Lumina at your desk for a full month. If it's not the best light you've ever worked under, send it back for a full refund. We cover return shipping.

Q: Is there a warranty?
A: Yes. Every Lumina comes with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. If anything goes wrong, we'll replace it вЂ” no hassle.

Q: Does Lumina work with smart home systems?
A: At launch, Lumina works as a standalone device with app control via Bluetooth and Wi-Fi. Integration with Apple HomeKit, Google Home, and Amazon Alexa is on our roadmap for Q2 2025.

Q: What's in the box?
A: Lumina lamp, USB-C cable, 30W power adapter, quick-start guide, and a very satisfying unboxing experience. No additional hardware or hubs required.

LUMINA LAUNCHES SMART DESK LAMP THAT AUTOMATICALLY ADAPTS TO TIME OF DAY,
CALENDAR EVENTS, AND AMBIENT ROOM LIGHTING вЂ” BRINGING INTELLIGENT LIGHTING
TO REMOTE WORKERS FOR $149

The first desk lamp designed specifically for how remote workers actually work вЂ”
with automatic adjustments that eliminate eye strain and boost productivity
without a single manual control.


[CITY, STATE] вЂ” [DATE] вЂ” Lumina today announced the launch of its flagship product: a smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on three real-time inputs вЂ” time of day, the user's calendar events, and ambient room lighting. Priced at $149, Lumina is now available for purchase at getlumina.com with free shipping during launch week.

Designed specifically for the 35 million Americans who work remotely, Lumina addresses a critical but often overlooked aspect of the home office: lighting. According to the American Optometric Association, prolonged exposure to improperly calibrated artificial light is a leading contributor to digital eye strain вЂ” a condition affecting nearly 70% of remote workers.

"Every remote worker has invested in a good chair, a good monitor, and a good keyboard," said [Founder Name], CEO and co-founder of Lumina. "But almost nobody has thought about their lighting вЂ” even though it's the single biggest environmental factor in eye strain, fatigue, and sleep disruption. We built Lumina to fix that, permanently, with zero effort from the user."

INTELLIGENT LIGHTING, ZERO CONFIGURATION

Unlike traditional desk lamps that require manual adjustment вЂ” or premium smart lights that demand extensive setup вЂ” Lumina is designed to work autonomously from the moment it's plugged in.

Key capabilities include:

вЂў CIRCADIAN RHYTHM ENGINE: Lumina automatically shifts color temperature throughout the day, delivering cool, energizing light (6500K) in the morning and warm, relaxing light (2700K) in the evening вЂ” aligned with the body's natural circadian cycle.

вЂў CALENDAR INTEGRATION: Lumina syncs with Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, and Apple Calendar to read the user's schedule and adjust lighting in real time. Focus blocks receive high-concentration cool light. Video calls receive warm, flattering light optimized for on-camera appearance.

вЂў AMBIENT LIGHT SENSING: A 360В° sensor array continuously measures room brightness and color, adjusting Lumina's output to maintain consistent desk lighting regardless of changing natural light conditions, weather, or time of day.

вЂў 90-SECOND SETUP: Lumina requires no hub, no smart home system, and no complex pairing process. Users plug it in and the lamp auto-calibrates to the room. An optional companion app (iOS/Android) enables calendar sync, custom scenes, and manual fine-tuning.

FILLING A GAP IN THE MARKET

The consumer desk lamp market is bifurcated between budget options under $50 with no intelligent features and premium offerings above $500 that are over-engineered for most users. Lumina targets the underserved middle вЂ” delivering advanced adaptive lighting technology at a price point accessible to the average remote worker.

"We studied the market extensively and found a clear gap," said [Founder Name]. "Budget lamps are static. Premium lamps are complex and expensive. Nobody was building a lamp that was both truly smart and genuinely simple вЂ” at a price that makes sense for the millions of people working from their kitchen tables, spare bedrooms, and home offices."

SPECIFICATIONS

вЂў Color temperature: 2700K вЂ“ 6500K (full spectrum)
вЂў Brightness: Up to 1,000 lumens, dimmable to 1%
вЂў CRI: 95+
вЂў Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.2, Wi-Fi 6
вЂў Power: USB-C (30W adapter included)
вЂў Materials: Machined aluminum, weighted steel base
вЂў Colors: Matte Black, Warm White
вЂў Weight: 2.4 lbs
вЂў Warranty: 2 years
вЂў Certifications: FCC, UL, Energy Star

AVAILABILITY AND PRICING

Lumina is available now at getlumina.com for $149 USD. All launch week orders include free shipping. Lumina comes with a 30-day no-questions-asked return policy and a 2-year manufacturer's warranty.

High-resolution product images, B-roll footage, and founder headshots are available in the Lumina press kit at getlumina.com/press.

ABOUT LUMINA

Lumina is a smart lighting company on a mission to make adaptive, health-conscious lighting accessible to everyone. Founded in [YEAR] by [Founder Name(s)], Lumina builds products designed for how people actually work вЂ” not how spec sheets say they should. The company is headquartered in [CITY, STATE]. Q: Do I need the app to use Lumina?
A: No. Lumina works fully out of the box вЂ” just plug it in and it auto-calibrates to your room using its ambient light sensor and built-in circadian rhythm engine. The app is optional and gives you access to calendar integration, custom scenes, and manual fine-tuning if you want it.

Q: Which calendars does Lumina support?
A: Lumina integrates with Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, and Apple Calendar. It reads event titles and types to assign optimal lighting profiles. For example, events tagged as "Focus" or "Deep Work" trigger cool, high-concentration light, while meetings trigger warmer, video-call-friendly light. You can customize these mappings in the app.

Q: How does the ambient light sensor work?
A: Lumina has a 360В° ambient light sensor array built into its head. It continuously measures the brightness and color temperature of light in your room and adjusts its output to maintain consistent, optimal lighting at your desk. It recalibrates in real time вЂ” so when clouds roll in or the sun shifts, your workspace lighting stays steady.

Q: Can I override the automatic settings?
A: Absolutely. While Lumina is designed to work autonomously, you always have full control. The companion app lets you adjust brightness and color temperature manually, create custom scenes, and save presets. You can also tap the base of the lamp to cycle between three quick-access modes (Focus, Relax, Video Call).

Q: What's the return policy?
A: We offer a 30-day no-questions-asked return policy. Try Lumina at your desk for a full month. If it's not the best light you've ever worked under, send it back for a full refund. We cover return shipping.

Q: Is there a warranty?
A: Yes. Every Lumina comes with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. If anything goes wrong, we'll replace it вЂ” no hassle.

Q: Does Lumina work with smart home systems?
A: At launch, Lumina works as a standalone device with app control via Bluetooth and Wi-Fi. Integration with Apple HomeKit, Google Home, and Amazon Alexa is on our roadmap for Q2 2025.

Q: What's in the box?
A: Lumina lamp, USB-C cable, 30W power adapter, quick-start guide, and a very satisfying unboxing experience. No additional hardware or hubs required.

POST 1 вЂ” Founder / Brand Story
---
We spent two years building a desk lamp.

That sounds ridiculous вЂ” until you realize that most remote workers spend 8-10 hours a day under lighting that's working against them. Too cool in the evening. Too warm in the morning. Too bright. Too dim. Always wrong.
